description: Committed baseline for the answer-quality gate (research_eval.rs::engine_gate::answer_quality_meets_committed_baseline). gold_hash and weights_version are pinned EXACTLY: editing gold_answers.json, renaming a metric, or changing a weight must refresh this file deliberately. min_mean_overall and case_floors are regression FLOORS (>=), so a genuine quality improvement passes without a rewrite. Never lower a floor to make a regression pass.
